deflection: That is not my concern, citizen. I deal with law and order.
Ask someone else about that. I am on duty.
I am a guard, not an information booth. Stick to matters of safety.
greetings: Halt! Oh, just a traveler. Welcome to {town}, {player_name}. Stay out of trouble.
Citizen. What do you need? Make it quick, I am on patrol.
State your business, {player_race}. I have rounds to make.
*nods* {player_name}. Keeping the peace here. What is it?
farewells: Move along, citizen. And stay out of trouble.
Keep your nose clean, {player_name}. I will be watching.
Safe travels. And obey the law wherever you go.
thanks_responses: No thanks needed. Law and order is its own reward.
insult_responses: One more word and I will have you in the stocks, {player_name}.
Threatening an officer of the guard? Bold move. Unwise, but bold.
*hand moves to sword hilt* Choose your next words very carefully.
no_match_responses: Speak clearly. Is this about a crime, a danger, or directions?
I did not understand that. Need directions? Have a crime to report?

responses.text: The roads are patrolled during the day, but I would not travel alone at night. Wolves have been bold.
We have reports of increased monster activity east of town. The captain doubled the patrols.
Crime report? Fill out a form at the barracks. Or just tell me what happened.
{town} is mostly safe, but watch your coin purse in the market. Pickpockets.
The guard always needs able bodies. Bandit camps need clearing and roads need patrolling.
Market is north, blacksmith east, tavern south, healer west. Temple is at the center.
The main road north is safe. South road is fine by day. Avoid the eastern forest after dark.
options: What is in the eastern forest?

responses.text: I deal in facts, not rumors. But there have been sightings. Strange lights in the hills at night.
The laws of {town} are simple: no stealing, no fighting in streets, no dark magic. Break them and you answer to me.
This {weather} weather makes patrol miserable. But duty is duty.
options: At least it keeps criminals indoors
